yaml.code:
# GitHub Actions CI/CD Pipeline
name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.9'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          pip install pytest pytest-cov
      
      - name: Run tests
        run: pytest --cov=app tests/

  deploy-staging:
    needs: test
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Deploy to Staging
        uses: akhileshns/heroku-deploy@v3.12.13
        with:
          heroku_api_key: ${{ secrets.HEROKU_API_KEY }}
          heroku_app_name: my-app-staging
          heroku_email: ${{ secrets.HEROKU_EMAIL }}

  deploy-production:
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Deploy to Production
        uses: akhileshns/heroku-deploy@v3.12.13
        with:
          heroku_api_key: ${{ secrets.HEROKU_API_KEY }}
          heroku_app_name: my-app-prod
          heroku_email: ${{ secrets.HEROKU_EMAIL }}

bash.code:
#!/bin/bash
# Blue-Green Deployment Script

APP_NAME="my-app"
NEW_VERSION=$1

echo "Starting Blue-Green Deployment for $NEW_VERSION"

# Create new environment (Green)
echo "Creating Green environment..."
heroku create $APP_NAME-green
heroku config:copy --from $APP_NAME --to $APP_NAME-green

# Deploy new version to Green
echo "Deploying $NEW_VERSION to Green..."
git push https://git.heroku.com/$APP_NAME-green.git main

# Run smoke tests on Green
echo "Running smoke tests..."
GREEN_URL=$(heroku info -s $APP_NAME-green | grep web_url | cut -d= -f2)
curl -f "${GREEN_URL}health" || { echo "Health check failed"; exit 1; }

# Switch traffic from Blue to Green
echo "Switching traffic to Green..."
heroku domains:add $APP_NAME.example.com --app $APP_NAME-green
heroku domains:remove $APP_NAME.example.com --app $APP_NAME

# Rename apps (Blue becomes old, Green becomes new Blue)
heroku rename $APP_NAME-old --app $APP_NAME
heroku rename $APP_NAME --app $APP_NAME-green

echo "Deployment complete! New version is live."
echo "Old version available at $APP_NAME-old for rollback"

# Optional: Delete old environment after verification
# heroku apps:destroy $APP_NAME-old --confirm $APP_NAME-old
